title: Gravity Challenge Pack
description: A pack centered around the original OneBlock map, that lets you change the direction of gravity.
body:
This pack was made for use in the Glitchcord Gravity challenge.

The pack centers around using the origins mod to let players choose the direction gravity pulls them (via gravity-api) at the start of the game. there are also a few QoL and performance mods thrown in for good measure. [OneBlock Map](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/worlds/oneblock) ### Mod List: - [CraterLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/craterlib) - [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks) - [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) - [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) - [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) - [Gravity API](https://modrinth.com/mod/gravity-api) - [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) - [MidnightLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightlib) - [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - [Quilted Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl) - [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - [Steve's Realistic Sleep](https://modrinth.com/mod/stevesrealisticsleep)
